title: Seth Rogen Has ‘No Plans’ to Work With James Franco Again and Says They Haven’t Spoken in a ‘Long Time’
content:
ByJack Dunn

Seth Rogenrecently toldThe New York Timesthat he hasn’t spoken toJames Francoin a “long time” and has “no plans” to work with him in the future.

When asked about where his relationship stands with Franco after he faced allegations of sexual misconduct, Rogen answered, “I honestly think the nuance of it is too personal for me to get into right now. It is a very personal thing. There’s the public-facing side of it, which I’ve spoken about, and I have the same stance publicly that I’ve had, and I think the proof is in the pudding — I have not worked with him in years. But the personal side of it is just so nuanced, and it involves people that I don’t know if I should be dragging into this. I don’t know what I would benefit from getting deeply into it. Nothing has changed since the last time I talked about all this, and I haven’t worked with him in a really long time and I have no plans to.”

NTY’s Lulu Garcia-Navarro then asked Rogen if he still talks to Franco, and Rogen replied, “I haven’t talked to him in a long time, no.”

Rogen and Franco were once a potent one-two punch in Hollywood. Their collaboration history started on Paul Feig’s short-lived coming-of-age series “Freaks and Geeks,” which ran for one season on NBC in late 1999. Rogen was 16 at the time, and Franco was 21. They went on to appear together in several beloved comedy films from the 2000s and 2010s, such as “Knocked Up,” “Pineapple Express,” “This Is the End” and “The Interview.”

Franco’s career was derailed in 2018after five women, four of them his acting students, accused him of sexually exploitative behavior. Two of the women in 2019 fileda class action lawsuitagainst Franco, claiming that he “engaged in widespread inappropriate and sexually charged behavior towards female students by sexualizing their power as a teacher and an employer by dangling the opportunity for roles in their projects.” Francosettled the casein 2021 for $2.23 million.

This isn’t the first time Rogen shut down the idea of reteaming with Franco. Ina 2021 interview with The Sunday Times, Rogen said he regretted saying in 2018 that he could work with Franco again, and put the possibility of a reunion to bed.

“I also look back to that interview in 2018 where I comment that I would keep working with James, and the truth is that I have not and I do not plan to right now,” Rogen said.

Franco toldVarietyin 2024 of his relationship with Rogen, “No. I haven’t talked to Seth. I love Seth, we had 20 great years together, but I guess it’s over. And not for lack of trying. I’ve told him how much he’s meant to me.”
title_zh: 塞斯·羅根(Seth Rogen)表示他「沒有計劃」再與詹姆斯·法蘭科(James Franco)合作，並透露他們已經「很長一段時間」沒有交談。
content_zh:
由傑克·邓恩(Jack Dunn)報導

塞斯·羅根(Seth Rogen)最近告訴《紐約時報》(The New York Times)，他已經有很長一段時間沒有和詹姆斯·法蘭科(James Franco)交談，並且“沒有計劃”在未來與他合作。

當被問及在法蘭科面對性不當行為指控後，他與法蘭科的關係如何時，羅根回答：“我誠實地認為這件事的細微之處對我來說太過個人化，現在不適合深入探討。這是一件非常個人的事情。這裡面有公開的部分，我已經談過，我在公開場合的立場與之前相同，我認為證據就在於實際情況——我已經好幾年沒有和他合作了。但個人的部分實在是太複雜了，涉及到一些我不知道是否應該牽扯進來的人。我不知道深入探討這件事對我有什麼好處。自從我上次談論這一切以來，沒有任何變化，我已經很久沒有和他合作，也沒有計劃這樣做。”

《紐約時報》的盧盧·加西亞-納瓦羅(Lulu Garcia-Navarro)隨後問羅根是否還和法蘭科保持聯繫，羅根回答：“我已經很久沒有和他交談了，沒有。”

羅根和法蘭科曾經是好萊塢的一對強力組合。他們的合作歷史始於保羅·費格(Paul Feig)的短命成長系列《怪胎與書呆子》(Freaks and Geeks)，該劇於1999年底在NBC播出一季。當時羅根16歲，法蘭科21歲。他們隨後在2000年代和2010年代出現於幾部備受喜愛的喜劇電影中，如《意外孕育》(Knocked Up)、《鳳梨快遞》(Pineapple Express)、《這就是結局》(This Is the End)和《訪問》(The Interview)。

法蘭科的職業生涯在2018年受到重創，因為五名女性，其中四名是他的演藝學生，指控他進行性剝削行為。2019年，兩名女性對法蘭科提起集體訴訟，聲稱他“對女性學生進行廣泛的不當和性暗示行為，通過性別化他作為教師和雇主的權力，並以提供角色機會為誘餌。”法蘭科於2021年以223萬美元和解此案。

這並不是羅根第一次拒絕與法蘭科重聚的想法。在2021年接受《星期日泰晤士報》(The Sunday Times)的訪問時，羅根表示他後悔在2018年說過可以再次與法蘭科合作，並將重聚的可能性擱置。

“我也回顧了2018年的那次訪問，我提到我會繼續與詹姆斯合作，事實是我沒有，也不打算現在這樣做，”羅根說。

法蘭科在2024年告訴《綜藝》(Variety)關於他與羅根的關係：“不。我沒有和塞斯交談。我愛塞斯，我們一起度過了20個美好的年頭，但我想這已經結束了。並不是因為缺乏努力。我告訴過他他對我有多重要。”
summary_zh:
由傑克·邓恩(Jack Dunn)報導

塞斯·羅根(Seth Rogen)最近告訴《紐約時報》(The New York Times)，他已經有很長一段時間沒有和詹姆斯·法蘭科(James Franco)交談，並且“沒有計劃”在未來與他合作。

當被問及在法蘭科面對性不當行為指控後，他與法蘭科的關係如何時，羅根回答：“我誠實地認為這件事的細微之處對我來說太過個人化，現在不適合深入探討。
